name: @appstrate/vinted-browser
description: First-party deterministic Browser Use MCP driver for the @appstrate/vinted integration. It attaches to Appstrate's isolated CDP worker for authenticated catalog access and guarded listing publication from read-only workspace images.
author: Appstrate

tools.name: acquire_session
tools.description: Private Appstrate connect hook. Signs in or restores bounded Vinted browser state and returns an authenticated proof. Never exposed to the agent.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search the public Vinted France catalog in the isolated browser and return a bounded list of visible item summaries.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Open one canonical vinted.fr/items/... URL and return bounded visible item details. Read-only.

tools.name: prepare_item_draft
tools.description: Fill a Vinted listing form from validated workspace images without submitting it. Returns a one-time draft token.

tools.name: publish_item
tools.description: Publish the exact prepared Vinted listing after explicit user approval, using its one-time draft token.

tools.name: browser_status
tools.description: Report the Vinted browser state and cookie names without exposing cookie values.
